case_title: JOHN MOORE VS. CASCADE DESIGNS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-23-2019 VACATED. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT FILED 6/10/19. (206)
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100044761) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN

INJUNCTIVE RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CASCADE DESIGNS, INC. DOES 1 TO 150, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-26-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-03-2018
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100044761) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHN HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2019 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100045008) FILED BY ATTORNEY PARAS, LARALEI S.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING AND/OR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff John Moore's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning and/or injunctive relief required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-23-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
